keyFactors: Switzerland has slightly higher Elo rating.
Both teams have similar recent form with Switzerland having a slightly better recent form.
Canada's defensive record is strong as demonstrated by a higher clean sheet rate.
The match is at a neutral venue, reducing potential home advantage.
risks: Canada has multiple injury concerns, which might impact performance negatively.
No historical head-to-head data, creating uncertainty in expectations.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Switzerland mit starker jüngster Form (recentForm 2.1) und hoher Offensivproduktion (2.02 Tore/Spiel); Canada defensiv sehr stabil (0.61 Gegentore/Spiel, 53.6% Clean-Sheet-Rate), was die Schweizer Offensive bremsen kann; Gastgebervorteil liegt bei Canada (Co-Host), trotz formal neutralem Spielort.
